name: alexandraforrand2016@gmail.com
subject: Fw: I'm forcing the PATRIOT Act to expire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The showdown over illegal NSA spying is today.

President Obama has declared "...I expect them to take action and take action swiftly."

But Rand is standing up to President Obama's demands by forcing illegal NSA spying to expire.

He won't allow Congress to rush a bill through the Senate that extends the NSA's bulk data collection program.

And the attacks are sure to escalate now that Rand stood up to President Obama.

So he's counting on you to be in his corner as this fight continues.

**[Please take a few moments to read the email below for more details about Rand's showdown with President Obama and add your name to Stand with Rand](http://randpaul.com/f/stop-nsa-spying-showdown-a?sr=rhf053115ca)**.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://randpaul.com/f/stop-nsa-spying-showdown-a?sr=rhf053115ca "http://randpaul.com/f/stop-nsa-spying-showdown-a?sr=rhf053115ca")
**Stand with Rand?**
**## NO PETITION ##******
---

In Liberty,

Alexandra

[](http://randpaul.com/f/stop-nsa-spying-showdown-a?sr=rhf053115ca)

* * *

**From** : Rand Paul [Rand.Paul@randpaul2016.com]
**To** : Fellow Conservative [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
**Subject** : I'm forcing the PATRIOT Act to expire

Fellow Conservative:

Tomorrow I will force the expiration of the NSA's illegal spying program.

I will not allow any bill extending illegal NSA spying to be rushed through ahead of the deadline.

My oath is to support and defend the Constitution and I won't back down.

The abuse of general warrants and the attack on the Bill of Rights must stop once-and-for-all.

We don't have to choose between fighting terrorism and obeying the Constitution.

That's why, two years ago, I sued the NSA.

It's why I proposed the Fourth Amendment Protection Act to force our government to abide by the Bill of Rights.

It's why I have fought for a full, open and honest debate on warrantless domestic spying -- a debate that is always kicked down the road in the name of "security."

So last week, with the proponents of this illegal spying rushing toward a deadline to ram through renewing illegal spying, I took a stand.

I filibustered for over 10 hours to shine a light on the vast expansion of the spy state and the erosion of our liberties.

I stood on the Senate floor until the early hours of the morning and helped block any short-term extension of these powers.

Tomorrow, the Senate will come back from recess with just hours left before the NSA's illegal spying powers expire.

And I won't allow defenders of the spy state to legislate through a manufactured crisis by holding a deadline over the head of Congress.

Let me be clear: I believe the number one job of the federal government is national defense.

I believe we must fight terrorism and I believe we must stand strong against our enemies.

But we do not need to compromise the Constitution in the process.

In fact, we must not.

I am ready and willing to start the debate on how we fight terrorism without giving up our liberty.

This can't be delayed any longer.

I do not do this to obstruct.

I'm fighting for a strong national defense that upholds the Constitution and protects Americans from enemies who seek to do us harm.

**[So I hope I can count on you to sign your petition and stand with me as I force illegal NSA spying to expire and stand strong against any deals or threats](http://randpaul.com/f/stop-nsa-spying-showdown-a?sr=rhf053115ca)**.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28117127:27021749269:m:1:879035888:F25B1120C5D02D15365044758FDE1F49:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28117128:27021749269:m:1:879035888:F25B1120C5D02D15365044758FDE1F49:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28117129:27021749269:m:1:879035888:F25B1120C5D02D15365044758FDE1F49:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWrG4lc1Nh). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWrG4lc1Nh)

name: Heather L.
subject: Friend, checking in on this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

Since Governor Bush emailed you yesterday, hundreds have stepped up to help us meet our May goal, but we are still short.

**I called some major donors who have agreed to match, dollar for dollar, every contribution that comes in before tonight at midnight.**

That's right, Friend. For the next 9 hours, we will be matching every contribution that comes in, so please chip in $25 right now: **[RighttoRisePAC.org/end-of-month/](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4030:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

We only have 9 hours left until our May deadline is over. **[Please stand with us and chip in $100, $50, $25, or anything you can spare today.](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4031:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you!

Heather Larrison
Finance Director
Right to Rise PAC

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush
Date: May 30, 2015
Subject: Update:**

Heather,

I'll get straight to the point. **Tomorrow is our end of month May fundraising deadline and we are still short.**

Since Hillary has announced, thousands of you have stepped up to show your commitment to stopping her, but she is traveling the country raising millions right now, so we need your help again.

[**Will you rush a contribution of $100, $50, $25, or anything you can spare today to make sure we have the resources necessary to defeat Hillary?**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4032:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

This is our most important deadline yet, so we need you to step up and stand with us now.

I am certain that we can right this ship and get America back on course, but only if you step up and help us fight back against Hillary's fundraising machine.

I wouldn't be asking if this wasn't serious, Heather. Can you stand with us and chip in $25 right now: [**RighttoRisePAC.org/end-of-month/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4033:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thanks for standing with us.

Jeb

[**P.S. Every dollar counts, so please chip in $100, $50, or even $25 right now before Sunday at midnight.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4034:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4035:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=508&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)

name: Jon
subject: Hey Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI3NDU0NzMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYzMDAzMzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,
**
This is it.**

Today is the last day of May.

Summer is right around the corner.

We are still short of our monthly goal.

[Will you help up hit our May fundraising goal?](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3NDU0NzMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYzMDAzMzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

The deadline is at midnight tonight.

[Become a Charter Member now!](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI3NDU0NzMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYzMDAzMzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,
Jon

**ABOUT OUR AMERICAN REVIVAL** Our American Revival believes that the government closest to the people is the most responsive and accountable to the people. We share the vision of our founders - that the powers of the federal government should be limited to those specified in the Constitution, and that federal overreach infringes on our American freedoms and values.

We will help lead a revival of the values that make our nation great, by highlighting ideas and policies that protect our shared American values while limiting the size and scope of government. [MAKE A SECURE CONTRIBUTION >>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3NDU0NzMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYzMDAzMzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Just 6 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend -

I hate to email you again, but I have some news to share.

**We thought that with the major donor match we 'd be able to blow past our May fundraising goal, but we are still $5,674 short.**

I'm asking one last time for your help before midnight tonight.

**[Friend , will you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or anything you can spare right now to make sure we meet this critical deadline?](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4076:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

I wouldn't be asking if this deadline wasn't so important. Hillary is already traveling the country raising millions of dollars to get back in the White House, so we need to do everything possible to stop her.

Your contribution makes sure that Hillary cannot just walk back to the White House. We're ready to put up a fight and I hope you are too.

Friend, please stand with us and help stop Hillary before our midnight deadline tonight: **[RighttoRisePAC.org/end-of-month/](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4077:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

I know I can count on you, Friend.

Thank you,

Jeb

[**P.S. We only have 6 hours left until our May fundraising deadline. All gifts will be matched until midnight tonight so please chip in $100, $50, or $25 right now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4078:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=4079:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1).
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)

name: Samantha Gross - Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: FW: Summer Spending Spree
body:
Friend - Did you see this email? Even though this isn't a national election year, the Koch brothers aren't messing around. They're preparing to spend record amounts of money attacking Democrats and gearing up for 2016. Many of you stood up with Chris this month to support his efforts in Congress to expose the secret dark money flowing into our elections. Our campaign is going to need support from donors like you to combat attacks from well-funded right-wing shadow groups. [**That 's why we're building up our Grassroots Action Fund - chip in now ahead of tonight's deadline >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e25/70cdc2ba/47825c73/3944d2a/3727930163/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eomsun?refcode=em053115_2&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+building+up+our&utm_campaign=em053115_2&source=em053115_2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $3 Our campaign is going to need support from donors like you to combat attacks from well-funded right-wing shadow groups. name: Rand Paul
subject: Countdown to midnight - illegal spying expires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

At midnight tonight, bulk collection of law-abiding Americans' phone data by our federal government must legally end.

Two weeks ago, virtually no one thought you and I would be here today.

But Fellow Conservative, I stood up to President Obama. And with your help, I stood up to spy-state apologists in BOTH parties and proved you and I could make a tremendous difference together.

While this fight was still raging on the Senate floor, my colleagues did everything possible to shut me up. But I fought back, giving a fiery five-minute speech you'll see below!

Matt Drudge even called it the "most compelling speech" of my campaign.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28119153:27025662301:m:1:879035888:4E2C45C7047706213648D2DB735709CE:r)

Now, with Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" expiring, the only path forward for the U.S. Senate is reform.

The "USA Freedom Act" is the most likely path forward over the next 48 hours.

I have concerns about this bill.

So with your continued support, I will fight hard to ensure my amendments are considered.

After all, as you and I have seen, the surveillance-state apologists want ZERO debate.

Instead, they're going to do everything they can to stop you and me from ensuring their proposed reforms have real teeth.

That's why I will once again be counting on your action to help me rally support for these amendments.

The fact is, I remain 100% committed to the belief we can have both liberty and security.

Ultimately, I believe the only way to fully restore our Fourth Amendment freedoms is to elect a new President who respects constitutional principles.

But Fellow Conservative, make no mistake.

While the fight is not yet over, you and I won an important victory today.

Please watch the video below.

**[And if you want to see more debate like this on the U.S. Senate floor, I must continue to count on you to stand with me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28119153:27025662301:m:1:879035888:4E2C45C7047706213648D2DB735709CE:r)**!

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28119153:27025662301:m:1:879035888:4E2C45C7047706213648D2DB735709CE:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28119154:27025662301:m:1:879035888:4E2C45C7047706213648D2DB735709CE:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28119155:27025662301:m:1:879035888:4E2C45C7047706213648D2DB735709CE:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28119156:27025662301:m:1:879035888:4E2C45C7047706213648D2DB735709CE:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWBQVvc1FN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWBQVvc1FN)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWBQVvc1FN) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-27025662301-echo3-D82D4659959E547EE7AD40FD0280B20B@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

[](http://www.paramountcommunication.com)**

name: Team Bernie
subject: Bernie t-shirts are here!
body:
#
Friend -
The Bernie Store is open for business! We have t-shirts, stickers, buttons, and more for you to show your support for Bernie's campaign.
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2164/43f17890/5e45f441/621dd0ba/1820485771/VEsH/ "https://store.berniesanders.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=teambernie&utm_campaign=store&utm_content=shopnowgif")
**[Visit the official Bernie campaign store now.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2164/43f17890/5e45f441/621dd0ba/1820485771/VEsE/ "https://store.berniesanders.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=teambernie&utm_campaign=store&utm_content=shopnowgif")**
\- Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2164/43f17890/5e45f441/621dd0bb/1820485771/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2164/43f17890/5e45f441/621dd0b8/1820485771/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| This month's deadline is just a few hours away. Friend -- I'll keep this quick. In just a few hours, our campaign will hit our end-of-month deadline. We're just a few donors away from meeting our 500-donor goal for this month. Your support is what will power me through this election. Your support is what will allow me to fight for middle-class families across Florida and across the country. Your support is why I'll always defend and protect programs like Social Security and Medicare. **Can I count on you to contribute today _BEFORE_ our deadline tonight? We only need a few more donors to step up!** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Need you on board
body:
Friend - A record amount of money will be spent in the 2016 election cycle. Our campaign is committed to running a grassroots campaign supported by donors like you. With your help, I will continue to fight for tougher campaign finance laws in the Senate. But right now, we need a well-funded Grassroots Action Fund in preparation for this summer's expected attacks from right-wing shadow groups. **Please donate to our Grassroots Action Fund ahead of our midnight end of month deadline. Use this link to make sure it counts:[action.vanhollen.org/May31](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e21/70cdc2ba/47823af9/3945b39/3021732432/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eomsun?refcode=em053115_3&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+actionvanhollenorgMay31&utm_campaign=em053115_3&source=em053115_3")** Thanks for your support, Chris
---

Paid for Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e21/70cdc2ba/47823af9/3945bcc/3021732432/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em053115_3&source=em053115_3") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
